name: ITL Golf Club
about: ITL Golf Club operates as an indoor golf training and entertainment facility, designed to provide a modern environment for golfers to practice and play. The venue utilizes simulator technology to deliver an immersive experience, allowing players to experience virtual courses and improve their skills regardless of weather conditions. With a focus on accessibility, the club offers an online booking system for convenience and gift cards for sharing the experience with others. The facility aims to blend training with entertainment, making it a versatile option for various golfing needs in the local area. The specific technology manufacturers and detailed course software are not explicitly listed on the public-facing site, but the infrastructure supports standard indoor golf activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf training and entertainment facility
Online booking system for easy scheduling

food_and_drink.notes: No explicit food menu found on the provided pages.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify rental availability. However, most indoor golf facilities provide rental clubs if you do not have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Policies are not explicitly stated. As this appears to be a training facility rather than a full-service bar, outside food policies may vary.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, playing 18 holes on a golf simulator takes approximately 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and the simulator settings.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Indoor golf simulators are generally family-friendly and suitable for juniors, though it is best to check with the venue regarding age restrictions or equipment availability for children.
